item.title: Reading List 2026
item.description:
Zhixuan's Blog https://zhixuan-zxli.github.io/llm/reading_2026/ -

Deepseek V4

  • DeepSeek-V4: Towards Highly Efficient Million-Token Context Intelligence ✅
  • mHC: Manifold-Constrained Hyper-Connections ✅
  • DSpark: Confidence-Scheduled Speculative Decoding with Semi-Autoregressive Generation ✅
  • DFlash: Block Diffusion for Flash Speculative Decoding ✅

GLM 5.2

  • GLM-5: from Vibe Coding to Agentic Engineering ✅
  • GLM-5.2: Built for Long-Horizon Tasks ✅
  • IndexShare ✅

Others

  • Lil’Log: Scaling Laws, Carefully
  • On-Policy Distillation ✅
  • mini-sglang

vLLM

  • Inside vLLM: Anatomy of a High-Throughput LLM Inference System ⭐️ ✅
  • 透过 vLLM 深入分析一次推理的完整旅程：从 HTTP 请求到 Token 流出 ✅
  • Async scheduling: PR 29957 & 32951
  • vLLM Mooncake KV Connector详解：让KV Cache在GPU之间“瞬移”
- https://zhixuan-zxli.github.io/llm/reading_2026/ -

item.title: 读书 2026
item.description:
Zhixuan's Blog https://zhixuan-zxli.github.io/life/reading_2026/ -

5月

  • 正常人， 萨莉・鲁尼 ✅

6月

  • 机器人之梦 ✅
  • 窄门，纪德 ✅
  • 爱的艺术，爱里希・弗洛姆 ✅
    1. 爱是将一个人生命里的事物给予出去，从而体验到自身的能力和生命的强壮、丰饶。
    2. 爱的元素包括：照顾【在意你】、责任【愿意回应你】、尊重【不占有你】和了解【看见真实的你】。
    3. 爱需要克服自恋，即只按照事物对自己有用或有害来体验它们。它的反面是客观性，是将客观图像和根据一己欲望与恐惧所形成的图像区分开来的能力。

7月

  • 小王子 ✅
  • 撒哈拉的故事，三毛
- https://zhixuan-zxli.github.io/life/reading_2026/ -

item.title: Zero-bubble async scheduling for spec decoding
item.description:
Zhixuan's Blog https://zhixuan-zxli.github.io/llm/async_scheduling/ -

vLLM PR #32951 (refactor of #29957) — how the CPU stops waiting on the GPU when async scheduling meets spec decoding.

Recap: async scheduling without spec decode

  • Scheduler runs one step ahead: while the GPU executes step N, the CPU prepares step N+1.
  • Sampled tokens of step N are not needed to prepare N+1 — the CPU writes -1 placeholders and patches them later.
  • CPU prep of N+1 fully overlaps GPU execution of N → no bubble.

Spec decode breaks this: to prepare step N+1, the CPU must know how many draft tokens were accepted in step N (rejection sampler output), because num_computed_tokens, seq_lens, positions, slot_mapping all depend on it.

The fix: three mechanisms

  1. Optimistic CPU prep — _update_states assumes all drafts accepted; emits -1 placeholders for prev_num_draft_len tokens and a deferred_spec_decode_corrections closure instead of syncing. _prepare_inputs builds optimistic_seq_lens_cpu.
  2. GPU-side correction — update_num_computed_tokens_for_batch_change repairs num_computed_tokens / num_accepted_tokens on the GPU using last step’s valid_sampled_token_count_gpu (never left the device). positions, seq_lens, slot_mapping (_compute_slot_mapping_kernel, triton) are now computed GPU-side from the corrected values.
  3. Deferred CPU correction — after execute_model has launched step N+1’s kernels, the closure runs _get_valid_sampled_token_count() and fixes CPU bookkeeping (req_state.num_computed_tokens, input_batch.num_computed_tokens_cpu). The sync overlaps GPU work.

Timeline

  • vLLM 0.14: bubbles between “target fwd N” & “samp N”, and between “MTP N” & “target fwd N+1”; blocking and redundant D2H copies
  • openPangu 2.0: remove the first buble and the redundant copy
  • vLLM 0.25: remove the blocking D2H from the critical path; GPU correction done by Triton kernel; CPU correction is deferred
- https://zhixuan-zxli.github.io/llm/async_scheduling/ -

item.title: Mooncake KV Connector
item.description:
Zhixuan's Blog https://zhixuan-zxli.github.io/llm/mooncake/ -

这篇博客是这个公众号文章的重整理和排版，暂时找不到更上游的出处。

引言

分离式推理的核心思想：让 Prefill 和 Decode 跑在不同的机器上，各干各的最擅长的事。但分离后，KV Cache 怎么从 Prefill 机器传到 Decode 机器？这就是Mooncake KV Connector要解决的问题。

当前业界分离式推理的 KV 传输方案：

  • Mooncake ：基于 RDMA 的零拷贝 P2P 传输，专为 GPU 间高速 KV 传输设计，vLLM 原生集成
  • NIXL （LMCache 使用）：NVIDIA 的通用高速传输库，支持多种内存类型
  • 自定义 TCP/gRPC ：简单但延迟高，适合原型验证

选型建议：如果追求最低延迟且有 RDMA 网卡（InfiniBand/RoCE），选 Mooncake；如果需要跨引擎共享 KV Cache 或持久化，选 LMCache+NIXL；如果只是验证概念，TCP 方案最简单。vLLM 对 Mooncake 的集成最深入，开箱即用。

MooncakeConnector，只支持p和d之间的kv cache传输，即pd分离式架构下的产物，不支持共享前缀缓存；MooncakeStoreConnector，只支持共享前缀缓存，不支持pd传输；这里提一下上一篇文章中主要介绍的OffloadingConnector，vLLM自带的，共享前缀缓存，有时候测试下来也挺好。和MooncakeStoreConnector类似，一个是单机缓存，一个是多机分布式存储池。

vLLM支持MultiConnector：同时使用PD传输（P2P）和 前缀缓存（Store），可以 MooncakeConnector + MooncakeStoreConnector组合，也可以 MooncakeConnector + OffloadingConnector组合。MultiConnector方式下，要注意两种connector有关block size等参数的大小要对齐。

1. Mooncake 是什么：不只是"传送带"

1.1 Mooncake 项目

Mooncake 是一个面向 LLM 推理的分布式 KV Cache 传输与存储系统。它的核心能力：

┌──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│                    Mooncake 核心能力                          │
│                                                              │
│  1. 零拷贝 RDMA 传输：GPU 之间直接传 KV Cache，不经 CPU 拷贝  │
│  2. 多级存储池：DRAM / SSD 构建分层缓存，慢存储也不怕          │
│  3. 高速互联：充分利用多网卡 RDMA 带宽                       │
│  4. 前缀去重：基于哈希的 KV Cache 去重与复用                  │
└──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘

在 vLLM 中，Mooncake 以KV Connector的形式集成——它是 vLLM KV 传输框架的一个"插件"，专门负责跨实例的 KV Cache 传输。

1.2 两种 Mooncake Connector

vLLM 提供了两种基于 Mooncake 的 Connector：

Connector 架构 传输方式 适用场景
MooncakeConnector P2P 直连 RDMA 零拷贝 分离式 Prefill/Decode
MooncakeStoreConnector 共享存储池 分布式 KV Pool 单机 offload + 跨实例共享

本文重点讲解MooncakeConnector（P2P 直连），最后简要介绍MooncakeStoreConnector。

2. 分离式推理架构：Prefill 和 Decode 各干各的

2.1 为什么需要分离

特性 Prefill Decode
计算类型 计算密集型（大量 token 并行） 访存密集型（逐 token 生成）
GPU 利用率 高（矩阵乘法密集） 低（大量等待内存访问）
批次大小 小（少量长请求） 大（大量短请求）
最优硬件 高算力 GPU（如 H100 SXM） 高带宽 GPU（如 H100 PCIe）

把它们绑在一起，就像让举重选手和体操选手共用一个训练馆——谁都施展不开。分离后，Prefill 机器可以全力做矩阵乘法，Decode 机器可以全力做内存访问，各得其所。

2.2 分离后的数据流

┌──────────────────┐                        ┌──────────────────┐
│   Prefiller      │    KV Cache 传输       │    Decoder       │
│   (Producer)     │ ═════════════════════► │   (Consumer)     │
│                  │     Mooncake RDMA      │                  │
│  1. 接收请求      │                        │  3. 接收 KV      │
│  2. Prefill      │                        │  4. Decode       │
│     生成 KV       │                        │     逐 token     │
│     Cache        │                        │     生成         │
└──────────────────┘                        └──────────────────┘
       GPU A                                       GPU B

关键问题：Prefill 生成的 KV Cache 怎么传到 Decode 机器？

3. MooncakeConnector 架构：双进程协作

3.1 类层次结构

# vllm/distributed/kv_transfer/kv_connector/v1/mooncake/mooncake_connector.py
class MooncakeConnector(KVConnectorBase_V1, SupportsHMA):
    """Mooncake P2P KV Cache 传输连接器"""
    # 内部类
    class MooncakeConnectorScheduler:  # Scheduler 进程侧
    class MooncakeConnectorWorker:     # Worker 进程侧

继承关系：

KVConnectorBase_V1 (抽象基类)
    └── MooncakeConnector
            ├── MooncakeConnectorScheduler  (Scheduler 侧实现)
            └── MooncakeConnectorWorker     (Worker 侧实现)

SupportsHMA (混入类，支持混合内存分配器)
    └── MooncakeConnector

3.2 双进程分工

vLLM V1 是双进程架构——Scheduler 进程做调度，Worker 进程做计算。MooncakeConnector 在两个进程中各有一个实例，分工不同：

┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│                    Prefiller 节点                            │
│                                                             │
│  Scheduler 进程                  Worker 进程                 │
│  ┌─────────────────────┐        ┌─────────────────────┐    │
│  │ Scheduler 侧        │        │ Worker 侧           │    │
│  │                     │        │                     │    │
│  │ · 判断哪些请求        │  meta  │ · 实际执行 RDMA      │    │
│  │   需要发送 KV        │ ────→  │   传输              │    │
│  │ · 构建传输元数据      │        │ · 注册 GPU 内存      │    │
│  │ · 通知 Worker 发送   │        │ · 调用 TransferEngine│    │
│  └─────────────────────┘        └─────────────────────┘    │
└─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘

┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│                    Decoder 节点                              │
│                                                             │
│  Scheduler 进程                  Worker 进程                 │
│  ┌─────────────────────┐        ┌─────────────────────┐    │
│  │ Scheduler 侧        │        │ Worker 侧            │    │
│  │                     │        │                     │    │
│  │ · 判断哪些请求        │  meta  │ · 实际接收 RDMA      │    │
│  │   需要接收 KV        │ ────→  │   传输               │    │
│  │ · 计算匹配的         │        │ · 将 KV 写入本地      │    │
│  │   token 数          │        │   KV Cache          │    │
│  └─────────────────────┘        └─────────────────────┘    │
└─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘

3.3 角色枚举

# vllm/distributed/kv_transfer/kv_connector/v1/base.py
class KVConnectorRole(enum.Enum):
    SCHEDULER = 0  # Scheduler 进程中的连接器
    WORKER = 1      # Worker 进程中的连接器

构造函数根据角色创建不同的内部实现：

# mooncake_connector.py
def __init__(self, vllm_config, role, kv_cache_config):
    if role == KVConnectorRole.SCHEDULER:
        self.connector_scheduler = MooncakeConnectorScheduler(...)
    elif role == KVConnectorRole.WORKER:
        self.connector_worker = MooncakeConnectorWorker(...)

4. KV 传输的完整数据流

4.1 Producer 侧（Prefiller）：发送 KV Cache

Step 1：Scheduler 判断哪些请求需要发送

# MooncakeConnectorScheduler
def build_connector_meta(self, scheduler_output) -> KVConnectorMetadata:
    meta = MooncakeConnectorMetadata()
    # 遍历需要发送的请求
    for req_id, (req, block_ids) in self._reqs_need_send.items():
        meta.add_new_req(
            request_id=req_id,
            local_block_ids=block_ids,        # 本地 block IDs
            kv_transfer_params=req.kv_transfer_params,  # 传输参数
            load_remote_cache=False,           # 我是发送方
        )
    return meta

Step 2：Worker 执行 RDMA 传输

# MooncakeConnectorWorker
def send_kv_to_decode(self, ...):
    # 1. 接收 Decoder 发来的 ZMQ 请求（包含目标地址信息）
    # 2. 验证 TP 配对和区域对齐
    # 3. 计算源地址和目标地址
    # 4. 调用 Mooncake TransferEngine 批量写入
    self._send_blocks(remote_session, src_ptrs, dst_ptrs, lengths)

Step 3：底层传输

# 底层 RDMA 传输
def _send_blocks(self, remote_session, src_ptrs, dst_ptrs, lengths):
    ret_value = self.engine.batch_transfer_sync_write(
        remote_session, src_ptrs, dst_ptrs, lengths
    )
    # 一次调用，批量传输多个 block

4.2 Consumer 侧（Decoder）：接收 KV Cache

Step 1：Scheduler 判断需要接收多少 token

# MooncakeConnectorScheduler
def get_num_new_matched_tokens(self, request, num_computed_tokens):
    params = request.kv_transfer_params
    if params.get("do_remote_prefill"):    # 远程 prefill：从 Producer 获取所有 prompt 的 KV
        token_ids = request.prompt_token_ids or []
        count = len(token_ids) - num_computed_tokens
    if count > 0:
        return count, True  # True = 异步加载

Step 2：Scheduler 记录需要接收的请求

def update_state_after_alloc(self, request, blocks, num_external_tokens):
    # 记录到 _reqs_need_recv，等待 Worker 处理
    self._reqs_need_recv[request.request_id] = PullReqMeta(
        d_req_id=request.request_id,
        transfer_id=transfer_id,
        local_block_ids=block_ids,
        remote_engine_id=remote_engine_id,
        remote_bootstrap_addr=remote_addr,
    )

Step 3：Worker 接收 KV Cache

# MooncakeConnectorWorker
def start_load_kv(self, forward_context, **kwargs):
    # 向 Producer 发送 ZMQ 请求
    # 等待 RDMA 传输完成
    # KV Cache 已写入本地 GPU 内存

4.3 完整时序

时间轴 →

Decoder (Consumer)                          Prefiller (Producer)
     │                                                │
     │  1. 请求到达，Scheduler 判断需要远程 prefill       │
     │  2. Scheduler 分配本地 block IDs                 │
     │                                                │
     │  3. ZMQ 请求 ──────────────────────────────→    │
     │     (包含: block IDs, 目标地址信息)               │
     │                                                │
     │                              4. Worker 收到请求  │
     │                              5. 计算源/目标地址   │
     │                              6. RDMA 写入 ───→  │
     │                                 (KV Cache 瞬移) │
     │                                                │
     │  7. KV Cache 到达本地 GPU                        │
     │  8. 开始 Decode                                 │
     │                                                │

5. 核心数据结构

5.1 MooncakeXferMetadata：传输的"快递单"

每次 KV 传输都附带一张"快递单"，告诉对方传什么、传到哪：

# mooncake_connector.py
class MooncakeXferMetadata(msgspec.Struct, omit_defaults=True):
    remote_hostname: str              # 对端主机名
    remote_port: int                  # 对端端口
    remote_tp_size: int               # 对端 TP 大小
    remote_tp_rank: int               # 对端 TP rank
    req_blocks: dict[ReqId, tuple[TransferId, list[list[int]]]] # 请求ID → (传输ID, block ID 列表)
    kv_caches_base_addr: list[int]    # KV Cache 基地址列表
    block_lens: list[int]             # 每个 block 的字节长度
    registered_layer_names: list[str] # 已注册的层名
    registered_layer_indices: list[int] # 已注册的层索引

5.2 PullReqMeta：接收请求的"取件码"

# mooncake_connector.py
@dataclass
class PullReqMeta:
    d_req_id: ReqId                   # Decoder 侧请求 ID
    transfer_id: TransferId           # 传输 ID
    local_block_ids: list[list[int]]  # 本地 block ID 列表
    remote_engine_id: EngineId        # 远程引擎 ID
    remote_bootstrap_addr: str        # 远程引导服务器地址
    expire_time: float = float("inf") # 过期时间
    pull_tasks_count: int = 0         # 拉取任务计数

5.3 TransferRegion：传输区域的"地图"

# mooncake_connector.py
@dataclass
class TransferRegion:
    """描述一次 KV Cache 传输的区域"""
    base_addr: int        # 基地址
    block_len: int        # 每个 block 的字节长度
    num_layers: int       # 层数
    num_blocks: int       # block 数量

6. 地址映射：Block ID 如何变成内存地址

RDMA 传输需要精确的内存地址。vLLM 的 block ID 是逻辑编号，Mooncake 需要的是物理地址。这个映射过程是 MooncakeConnector 的核心机制之一。

6.1 内存注册

Worker 启动时，将 GPU 上的 KV Cache 内存注册到 Mooncake TransferEngine：

# MooncakeConnectorWorker
def register_kv_caches(self, kv_caches: dict[str, torch.Tensor]):
    # 收集每层 KV Cache 的基地址和长度
    for layer_name, cache in kv_caches.items():
        base_addr = cache.data_ptr()          # GPU 内存基地址
        block_len = cache.stride(0) * cache.element_size()  # 每个 block 的字节长度
        self.kv_caches_base_addr.append(base_addr)
        self.block_len_per_layer.append(block_len)
    # 批量注册到 Mooncake TransferEngine
    ret_value = self.engine.batch_register_memory(kv_data_ptrs, kv_data_lens)

笔者注：batch_register_memory是 RDMA 的关键步骤——只有注册过的内存区域，才能被远程节点直接访问。这就像给仓库的门装了智能锁，只有授权的人才能直接取货。

6.2 地址计算

传输时，根据 block ID 计算实际的内存地址：

# 发送端地址计算
src_ptr = local_region.base_addr + local_block_id * local_region.block_len + offset

# 接收端地址计算
dst_ptr = remote_region.base_addr + remote_block_id * remote_region.block_len + offset

KV Cache 内存布局（单层）:

base_addr ──→ ┌──────────┬──────────┬──────────┬──────────┐
              │ Block 0  │ Block 1  │ Block 2  │ Block 3  │
              │ 64 KB    │ 64 KB    │ 64 KB    │ 64 KB    │
              └──────────┴──────────┴──────────┴──────────┘
              ↑                     ↑
              base_addr             base_addr + 2 * block_len

7. Bootstrap Server：两个陌生人的"介绍人"

Prefiller 和 Decoder 启动时互不知道对方的地址。它们需要一个"介绍人"来交换连接信息——这就是MooncakeBootstrapServer。

# vllm/distributed/kv_transfer/kv_connector/v1/mooncake/mooncake_utils.py
class MooncakeBootstrapServer:
    """运行在全局 rank 0 的 Prefiller Worker 上的集中式注册服务"""

工作流程：

┌─────────────┐     注册      ┌──────────────────┐     注册      ┌─────────────┐
│ Prefiller   │ ───────────→ │ Bootstrap Server │ ←──────────── │ Decoder     │
│ Worker 0    │   (IP,端口,   │ (rank 0 上运行)   │   (IP,端口,   │ Worker 0    │
│             │    TP 信息)   │                  │    TP 信息)   │             │
└─────────────┘              └──────────────────┘               └─────────────┘
                                      │
                                      │ 交换连接信息
                                      ▼
                              Prefiller 和 Decoder 互相知道对方地址
                              可以开始 RDMA 传输

环境变量控制：

环境变量 默认值
VLLM_MOONCAKE_BOOTSTRAP_PORT 8998
VLLM_MOONCAKE_ABORT_REQUEST_TIMEOUT 480s

8. 异构 TP 支持：Prefiller 和 Decoder 的 TP 可以不同

这是一个非常实用的特性——Prefiller 和 Decoder 可以使用不同的 TP 配置。

比如 Prefiller 用 4 卡 TP（需要大算力），Decoder 用 2 卡 TP（需要高带宽），MooncakeConnector 能自动处理不同 TP 之间的 block 映射。

Prefiller (TP=4):                    Decoder (TP=2):
┌──────┬──────┬──────┬──────┐        ┌──────┬──────┐
│GPU 0 │GPU 1 │GPU 2 │GPU 3 │        │GPU 0 │GPU 1 │
│L0-L9 │L0-L9 │L0-L9 │L0-L9 │   →    │L0-L9 │L0-L9 │
│(rank0)│(rank1)│(rank2)│(rank3)│    │(rank0)│(rank1)│
└──────┴──────┴──────┴──────┘        └──────┴──────┘

每张卡有相同的层数，但 TP rank 不同 MooncakeConnector 自动映射: P_rank0+P_rank1 → D_rank0, P_rank2+P_rank3 → D_rank1 传输时，MooncakeXferMetadata中的remote_tp_size和remote_tp_rank字段确保了正确的 rank 映射。

9. MooncakeStoreConnector：共享存储池模式

除了 P2P 直连模式，Mooncake 还提供了一种共享存储池模式——MooncakeStoreConnector。

9.1 两种模式对比

特性 MooncakeConnector (P2P) MooncakeStoreConnector (Store)
架构 Prefiller ↔ Decoder 直连 通过共享 KV Pool 间接连接
传输方式 RDMA P2P RDMA → 分布式存储池 → RDMA
前缀缓存 不支持 支持（基于哈希去重）
适用场景 分离式 Prefill/Decode 单机 offload + 跨实例共享
去重 不支持 支持（相同前缀只存一份）

9.2 Store 模式架构

┌──────────┐                    ┌──────────────────┐                   ┌──────────┐
│ vLLM     │   RDMA 写入        │  Mooncake Store  │   RDMA 读取        │ vLLM     │
│ 实例 A   │ ────────────────→  │  (分布式 KV Pool) │ ────────────────→  │ 实例 B   │
│          │                    │                  │                   │          │
│ Prefill  │                    │  · CPU DRAM      │                   │ Decode   │
│ 完成     │                     │  · SSD           │                   │ 开始     │
│          │                    │  · 前缀去重       │                   │          │
└──────────┘                    └──────────────────┘                   └──────────┘

Store 模式的关键概念：

概念 说明
global_segment_size 每个 GPU 贡献给共享池的 CPU 内存大小
local_buffer_size 本地私有缓冲区大小
Embedded 模式 共享池在 vLLM 进程内运行
Standalone 模式 共享池作为独立进程运行

9.3 Store 模式配置详解

Store 模式比 P2P 模式多了几个前置步骤：启动 Master Server、编写配置文件、设置环境变量。

Step 1：启动 Mooncake Master Server

Master Server 管理分布式存储的元数据，协调各节点的连接。所有 vLLM 实例共享同一个 Master Server：

mooncake_master --port 50051

Step 2：编写 mooncake_config.json

{
  "mode": "embedded",
  "metadata_server": "P2PHANDSHAKE",
  "master_server_address": "127.0.0.1:50051",
  "global_segment_size": "80GB",
  "local_buffer_size": "4GB",
  "protocol": "rdma",
  "device_name": "",
  "enable_offload": false
}

Step 3：设置环境变量

export MOONCAKE_CONFIG_PATH=/path/to/mooncake_config.json

Step 4：启动 vLLM

# 所有python进程使用同一个哈希种子
MOONCAKE_CONFIG_PATH=mooncake_config.json \
PYTHONHASHSEED=0 \
vllm serve meta-llama/Llama-3.1-8B-Instruct \
  --kv-transfer-config '{
    "kv_connector": "MooncakeStoreConnector",
    "kv_role": "kv_both"
  }'

9.4 MultiConnector：同时使用 P2P 和 Store

vLLM 支持组合使用多个 Connector，实现分离式 P/D+共享前缀缓存：

Prefiller 节点：

MOONCAKE_CONFIG_PATH=mooncake_config.json \
VLLM_MOONCAKE_BOOTSTRAP_PORT=50052 \
vllm serve meta-llama/Llama-3.1-8B-Instruct --port 8100 \
  --kv-transfer-config '{
    "kv_connector": "MultiConnector",
    "kv_role": "kv_producer",
    "kv_connector_extra_config": {
        "connectors": [
            {"kv_connector": "MooncakeConnector", "kv_role": "kv_producer"},
            {"kv_connector": "MooncakeStoreConnector", "kv_role": "kv_both"}
        ]
    }
  }'

Decoder 节点：

MOONCAKE_CONFIG_PATH=mooncake_config.json \
VLLM_MOONCAKE_BOOTSTRAP_PORT=50053 \
vllm serve meta-llama/Llama-3.1-8B-Instruct --port 8200 \
  --kv-transfer-config '{
    "kv_connector": "MultiConnector",
    "kv_role": "kv_consumer",
    "kv_connector_extra_config": {
        "connectors": [
            {"kv_connector": "MooncakeConnector", "kv_role": "kv_consumer"},
            {"kv_connector": "MooncakeStoreConnector", "kv_role": "kv_consumer"}
        ]
    }
  }'

9.5 Disk Offloading：SSD 磁盘缓存

当 CPU 内存也不够用时，MooncakeStoreConnector 还支持SSD 磁盘 offloading——将 KV Cache 进一步溢出到 SSD，形成 GPU→CPU→SSD 的三级存储。

Disk Offloading 通常运行在standalone-store模式下：一个外部的mooncake_client进程拥有 CPU 池和 SSD 层，每个 vLLM rank 只是纯请求者。这避免了每个 rank 重复 SSD 池，并将 DirectIO 预算追踪集中在单一进程。

三端对齐要求：

  • mooncake_master: 启动时加 --enable_offload=true
  • mooncake_client（owner）：启动时加 --enable_offload=true + 设置 MOONCAKE_OFFLOAD_FILE_STORAGE_PATH 指定 SSD 路径
  • vLLM 侧：mooncake_config.json中 "enable_offload": true

vLLM 侧配置示例（standalone-store + SSD）：

{
  "mode": "standalone-store",
  "metadata_server": "P2PHANDSHAKE",
  "master_server_address": "127.0.0.1:50051",
  "global_segment_size": 0,
  "local_buffer_size": "4GB",
  "protocol": "rdma",
  "device_name": "mlx5_0",
  "enable_offload": true
}

笔者注：standalone-store模式下global_segment_size必须为 0（rank 不贡献内存），由外部mooncake_client提供。可以用MOONCAKE_PREFERRED_SEGMENT=127.0.0.1:50053将 rank 指向本地 owner 的 segment。SSD 的磁盘路径、淘汰策略、DirectIO 缓冲区大小等由mooncake_client侧的环境变量控制（MOONCAKE_OFFLOAD_FILE_STORAGE_PATH、MOONCAKE_BUCKET_EVICTION_POLICY等），与 vLLM 的 JSON 配置无关。

10. 与其他 Connector 的对比

特性 MooncakeConnector OffloadingConnector LMCacheConnector
传输目标 远程 GPU 本地 CPU 远程存储
传输协议 RDMA 自定义内核 NIXL
零拷贝 是 否 是
分布式 是（跨节点） 否（单节点） 是（跨节点）
前缀缓存 Store 模式支持 是（LRU/ARC） 是（CacheBlend）
P2P 直连 是 否 否
适用场景 分离式 P/D 单机显存扩展 跨引擎共享

11. 配置与使用

11.1 基础用法：分离式 Prefill/Decode

见mooncake_connector_usage.md。

代理服务（路由请求）：

python examples/disaggregated/mooncake_connector/mooncake_connector_proxy.py \
  --prefill http://192.168.0.2:8010 8998 \
  --decode http://192.168.0.3:8020

笔者注：Proxy 的–prefill参数需要同时传入 Prefiller 的 bootstrap 端口（默认 8998）。Proxy 启动后会查询 Prefiller 的 Bootstrap Server，获取 engine_id 等连接信息，然后将kv_transfer_params（包含do_remote_prefill、remote_bootstrap_addr、transfer_id）注入到发给 Decoder 的请求中，协调 P2P 传输。

11.2 Store 模式配置

MOONCAKE_CONFIG_PATH=mooncake_config.json \
PYTHONHASHSEED=0 \
vllm serve meta-llama/Llama-3.1-8B-Instruct \
  --kv-transfer-config '{
    "kv_connector": "MooncakeStoreConnector",
    "kv_role": "kv_both"
  }'

Store 模式的 kv_connector_extra_config 参数：

参数 默认值 说明
load_async true 异步加载 KV Cache，提高计算与 I/O 重叠度
lookup_async false 后台线程执行前缀缓存查找，不阻塞调度步骤。请求会等待查找完成后在后续步骤恢复
enable_cross_layers_blocks false 启用跨层 block 打包，减少 store 操作次数
lookup_rpc_port 0 ZMQ lookup RPC socket 的自定义端口
cache_prefix "" 存储键的命名空间前缀

12. 参考

  • Mooncake 项目：github.com/kvcache-ai/Mooncake — Mooncake 分布式 KV Cache 传输与存储系统
  • vLLM 文档：docs/features/mooncake_connector_usage.md — MooncakeConnector P2P 模式使用指南
  • vLLM 文档：docs/features/mooncake_store_connector_usage.md — MooncakeStoreConnector 共享存储池使用指南
  • vLLM 源码：vllm/distributed/kv_transfer/kv_connector/v1/mooncake/mooncake_connector.py — MooncakeConnector 主实现
  • vLLM 源码：vllm/distributed/kv_transfer/kv_connector/v1/mooncake/mooncake_utils.py — Bootstrap Server
  • vLLM 示例：examples/disaggregated/mooncake_connector/ — 分离式推理示例脚本

本文属于 [vLLM 技术博客系列]，欢迎持续关注。

- https://zhixuan-zxli.github.io/llm/mooncake/ -

item.title: vLLM frontend to backend: AsyncLLM and Engine
item.description:
Zhixuan's Blog https://zhixuan-zxli.github.io/llm/vllm_frontend_backend/ -

分解 vLLM 前端 (AsyncLLM) 和 后端 (EngineCore) 架构。 综合自 博客 Anatomy of vLLM（Aleksa Gordic，2025-09-05）、微信公众号文章 透过 vLLM 深入分析一次推理的完整旅程，以及 vLLM 源码分析（基于 releases/v0.14.0 分支）。

1. HTTP 入口：FastAPI → OpenAIServing → AsyncLLM

1.1 FastAPI Route (vllm/entrypoints/openai/api_server.py:478)

@router.post("/v1/chat/completions", dependencies=[Depends(validate_json_request)])
@with_cancellation
@load_aware_call
async def create_chat_completion(request: ChatCompletionRequest, raw_request: Request):
    handler = chat(raw_request)  # 从 app.state 获取 OpenAIServingChat
    generator = await handler.create_chat_completion(request, raw_request)
    if isinstance(generator, ChatCompletionResponse):
        return JSONResponse(content=generator.model_dump())
    return StreamingResponse(content=generator, media_type="text/event-stream")

1.2 OpenAIServingChat (vllm/entrypoints/openai/serving_chat.py:224)

预处理分为两个阶段：chat template 渲染 + tokenize（_preprocess_chat）和构造引擎请求（_process_inputs）。

async def create_chat_completion(self, request, raw_request=None):
    # 1) 模型检查 + tokenizer 获取
    tokenizer = await self.engine_client.get_tokenizer()
    # 2a) 预处理阶段一：渲染 chat template + 分词
    conversation, engine_prompts = await self._preprocess_chat(
        request, tokenizer, request.messages, ...)
    # 2b) 预处理阶段二：封装为 EngineCoreRequest + 送入引擎
    for i, engine_prompt in enumerate(engine_prompts):
        engine_request, tokenization_kwargs = await self._process_inputs(
            request_id, engine_prompt, sampling_params, ...)
        generator = self.engine_client.generate(
            engine_request, sampling_params, request_id, ...) # type: AsyncGenerator[RequestOutput, None]
    # 3) 包装为 OpenAI 格式的 Response / SSE Stream
    return await self.chat_completion_full_generator(request, result_generator, ...)

  • _preprocess_chat() — Chat Template 渲染 + 分词 → TokensPrompt (serving_engine.py:1166)

  • _process_inputs() — TokensPrompt → EngineCoreRequest (serving_engine.py:1293)

1.3 EngineClient 协议 (vllm/engine/protocol.py)

class EngineClient(ABC):
    """Protocol class for Clients to Engine"""
    vllm_config: VllmConfig
    input_processor: InputProcessor

    @abstractmethod
    def generate(self, prompt, sampling_params, request_id, ...) -> AsyncGenerator[RequestOutput, None]:
        """Generate outputs for a request."""

2. AsyncLLM：前端进程的指挥中心 (vllm/v1/engine/async_llm.py)

2.1 构造函数

class AsyncLLM(EngineClient):
    def __init__(self, vllm_config, executor_class, log_stats, ...):
        # 1) Tokenizer
        self.tokenizer = cached_tokenizer_from_config(model_config)

        # 2) InputProcessor：原始输入 → EngineCoreRequest
        self.input_processor = InputProcessor(vllm_config, tokenizer)

        # 3) OutputProcessor：EngineCoreOutputs → RequestOutput
        self.output_processor = OutputProcessor(tokenizer, log_stats, ...)

        # 4) EngineCoreClient：跨进程通信桥梁（InprocClient / AsyncMPClient / DPLBAsyncMPClient）
        self.engine_core = EngineCoreClient.make_async_mp_client(vllm_config, executor_class, ...)

        # 5) 启动 output_handler 后台 asyncio task
        self._run_output_handler()

2.2 generate()：核心生成流程

async def generate(self, prompt, sampling_params, request_id, ...):
    # 1) 创建 RequestOutputCollector（per-request async queue）
    q = await self.add_request(request_id, prompt, sampling_params, ...)

    # 2) 循环从 queue 中拉取 RequestOutput，yield 给上层
    finished = False
    while not finished:
        out = q.get_nowait() or await q.get()
        finished = out.finished
        yield out  # RequestOutput

2.3 add_request()：请求入队

async def add_request(self, request_id: str, prompt: EngineCoreRequest, ...):
    #
    request = self.input_processor.process_inputs(request_id, prompt, ...)
    self._run_output_handler()
    # 注册到 OutputProcessor（前端进程）
    self.output_processor.add_request(request, prompt, parent_req, index, queue)
    # 发送到 EngineCore（后端进程，ZMQ）
    await self.engine_core.add_request_async(request)
    #
    return queue # type: RequestOutputCollector

请求被同时注册到两个位置：OutputProcessor（前端，管输出）和 EngineCoreClient（后端，管调度执行）。

2.4 output_handler：后台输出泵

async def output_handler():
    while True:
        # 1) 从 EngineCore（ZMQ output socket）拉取 EngineCoreOutputs
        outputs = await engine_core.get_output_async()

        # 2) 分块处理（避免长时间阻塞 event loop）
        for start in range(0, num_outputs, chunk_size):
            outputs_slice = engine_core_outputs[start:end]
            processed = output_processor.process_outputs(outputs_slice, ...)
            # RequestOutputs 被推送到对应 request 的 queue

            # 3) 终止需要 abort 的请求（stop string 命中）
            if processed.reqs_to_abort:
                await engine_core.abort_requests_async(processed.reqs_to_abort)

3. EngineCoreClient：跨进程通信层 (vllm/v1/engine/core_client.py)

3.1 类继承体系

EngineCoreClient (ABC)
├── InprocClient          # 同进程模式（V0 兼容 / 调试用）
│     └── 直接持有 EngineCore 实例，无 ZMQ
├── MPClient (ABC)        # 多进程基类（ZMQ 通信）
│     ├── SyncMPClient    # 同步模式（LLM.generate 离线推理）
│     └── AsyncMPClient   # 异步模式（AsyncLLM 在线服务）
│           ├── DPAsyncMPClient    # 数据并行 + 外部负载均衡
│           └── DPLBAsyncMPClient  # 数据并行 + 内部负载均衡

3.2 MPClient：多进程通信基类

class MPClient(EngineCoreClient):
    def __init__(self, asyncio_mode, vllm_config, executor_class, log_stats, ...):
        # 序列化
        self.encoder = MsgpackEncoder()
        self.decoder = MsgpackDecoder(EngineCoreOutputs)

        # 启动 EngineCore 进程（通过 launch_core_engines）
        engine_manager, coordinator, addresses = launch_core_engines(...)

        # 创建 ZMQ sockets
        self.input_socket = make_zmq_socket(ctx, input_address, zmq.ROUTER, bind=True)
        self.output_socket = make_zmq_socket(ctx, output_address, zmq.PULL)

3.3 AsyncMPClient：生产环境的异步客户端

class AsyncMPClient(MPClient):
    def __init__(self, ...):
        self.outputs_queue = asyncio.Queue[EngineCoreOutputs | Exception]()
        self._ensure_output_queue_task()  # 后台 asyncio task 从 output_socket 读取

    async def get_output_async(self) -> EngineCoreOutputs:
        """被 AsyncLLM.output_handler 调用"""
        return await self.outputs_queue.get()

    async def add_request_async(self, request: EngineCoreRequest) -> None:
        """发送 ADD 请求到 EngineCore"""
        await self._send_input(EngineCoreRequestType.ADD, request)

3.4 DPAsyncMPClient & DPLBAsyncMPClient：DP并行

class DPAsyncMPClient(AsyncMPClient):
    """多 EngineCore 实例，外部负载均衡"""

class DPLBAsyncMPClient(DPAsyncMPClient):
    """多 EngineCore 实例，内部负载均衡"""
    def get_core_engine_for_request(self, request):
        # 从所有 engine 中选择负载最低的
        # score = waiting * 4 + running

3.5 DPCoordinator (vllm/v1/engine/coordinator.py)

DPCoordinator（独立进程，DP > 1 时启动）
├── 收集各 DP engine rank 的 stats（waiting/running counts）
├── 广播 stats 给所有 frontend process（用于 LB 决策）
├── 追踪 "request wave" 和 running state
└── 收到 FIRST_REQ 消息时广播 START_DP_WAVE 唤醒 engines

4. EngineCore & EngineCoreProc：后端进程的引擎核心 (vllm/v1/engine/core.py)

类层次

EngineCore                      # 引擎核心逻辑（调度 + 执行 + 后处理）
└── EngineCoreProc              # ZMQ 封装 → 作为独立进程运行
     └── DPEngineCoreProc       # DP并行 / MoE

EngineCore 构造函数

class EngineCore:
    def __init__(self, vllm_config, executor_class, log_stats, ...):
        # 1) Model Executor（UniProc / MultiProc / RayDistributed）
        self.model_executor = executor_class(vllm_config)
        # 4) Scheduler（FCFS 或 Priority，含 KV cache manager）
        self.scheduler = Scheduler(vllm_config, kv_cache_config, ...)

step()：Schedule -> Execute -> Sample -> Update

EngineCoreProc：ZMQ 封装的进程模式

class EngineCoreProc(EngineCore):
    """ZMQ-wrapper for running EngineCore in background process."""

    def __init__(self, vllm_config, handshake_address, executor_class, ...):
        # 三队列架构
        self.input_queue = queue.Queue()    # 接收来自 input thread 的请求
        self.output_queue = queue.Queue()   # 输出到 output thread

        # 启动 handshake（ZMQ DEALER）
        with self._perform_handshakes(...) as addresses:
            # 初始化父类 EngineCore
            super().__init__(vllm_config, executor_class, ...)

            # input thread：ZMQ input socket → input_queue
            input_thread = threading.Thread(target=self.process_input_sockets, ...)

            # output thread：output_queue → ZMQ output socket
            self.output_thread = threading.Thread(target=self.process_output_sockets, ...)
            
    def run_engine_core(*args, dp_rank: int = 0, local_dp_rank: int = 0, **kwargs):

        engine_core: EngineCoreProc | None = None

        if data_parallel and vllm_config.model_config.is_moe:
            # Set data parallel rank for this engine process.
            parallel_config.data_parallel_rank = dp_rank
            engine_core = DPEngineCoreProc(*args, **kwargs)
        else:
            engine_core = EngineCoreProc(*args, engine_index=dp_rank, **kwargs)

        engine_core.run_busy_loop()

    def run_busy_loop(self):
        while True:
            # 1) 从 input_queue 拉取请求，加入 scheduler
            self._process_input_queue()
            # 2) 执行一步引擎循环
            self._process_engine_step()

5. Executor → Worker ：模型执行层 (vllm/v1/executor/)

5.1 Executor 抽象

class Executor(ABC):
    """An executor is responsible for executing the model on one or more devices."""

    @staticmethod
    def get_class(vllm_config) -> type["Executor"]:
        if backend == "mp":
            return MultiprocExecutor  # 多 GPU（TP/PP），本地 multiprocessing
        elif backend == "ray":
            return RayDistributedExecutor  # 分布式，Ray 编排

    @abstractmethod
    def execute_model(self, scheduler_output, non_block=False):
        """执行一次模型前向 + 采样"""
    @abstractmethod
    def collective_rpc(self, method, timeout, args, kwargs):
        """在所有 worker 上执行 RPC 调用"""

Executor 对比：

Executor Workers 通信方式 适用场景
UniProcExecutor 1 个 Worker（同进程） 直接调用 单 GPU 调试 / 小模型
MultiprocExecutor N 个 Worker（独立进程） rpc_broadcast_mq（共享内存队列） 单机多 GPU（TP/PP）
RayDistributedExecutor N 个 Ray Actor Ray 多机分布式

5.2 MultiprocExecutor：多 GPU 编排

class MultiprocExecutor(Executor):
    def __init__(self, vllm_config):
        # 为每个 rank 创建 WorkerProc 子进程
        for rank in range(world_size):
            WorkerProc.make_worker_process(rank, ...)

    def execute_model(self, scheduler_output, non_block=False):
        return self.collective_rpc(
            "execute_model", 
            args=(scheduler_output),
            ...
        )

6. 完整请求追踪：从 curl 到 token

以下以 POST /v1/chat/completions 为例：

Client: curl -X POST http://localhost:8000/v1/chat/completions ...

  │
  ▼
① FastAPI (api_server.py:490)
  create_chat_completion(request, raw_request)
    → handler = app.state.openai_serving_chat
    → handler.create_chat_completion(request, raw_request)
  │
  ▼
② OpenAIServingChat (serving_chat.py:224)
  create_chat_completion():
    → _preprocess_chat()        # Chat template → tokenize → EngineCoreRequest
    → engine_client.generate()  # → AsyncLLM.generate()
  │
  ▼
③ AsyncLLM.generate() (async_llm.py:389)
    → add_request():
        input_processor.process_inputs()  # → EngineCoreRequest
        output_processor.add_request()    # 注册 output handler 侧状态
        engine_core.add_request_async()   # 发送 ZMQ 消息
    → 循环 yield RequestOutput（从 RequestOutputCollector 拉取）
  │
  ▼  [ZMQ: ADD request via input_socket]
  │
④ EngineCoreProc.process_input_sockets() (core.py:1068)
  input thread: ZMQ recv → msgpack decode → preprocess_add_request()
    preprocess_add_request()
      └─ Request.from_engine_core_request()
    input_queue.put_nowait((ADD, req))
  │
  ▼
⑤ EngineCoreProc.run_busy_loop() (core.py:948)
  _process_input_queue():
    → input_queue.get() → _handle_client_request(ADD)
    → scheduler.add_request(request)  # → waiting queue
  _process_engine_step():
    → step_fn() → EngineCore.step()
  │
  ▼
⑥ EngineCore.step() (core.py:370)
  scheduler.schedule()
    → 遍历 running queue（decode 请求，分配 1 KV block）
    → 遍历 waiting queue（prefill 请求，满足 token budget 时调度）
    → allocate_slots()：从 free_block_queue 分配 KV cache blocks
    → 返回 SchedulerOutput
  │
  ▼
⑦ model_executor.execute_model(scheduler_output)
    → MultiprocExecutor: rpc_broadcast_mq → 各 Worker 进程
    → Worker → GPUModelRunner.execute_model()
  │
  ▼
⑧ scheduler.update_from_output(scheduler_output, model_output)
    → 将 new_token_ids 追加到各 Request
    → check stop conditions（EOS / length / stop string）
    → FINISHED 请求：free KV blocks → 标记完成
    → 构造 EngineCoreOutputs
  │
  ▼
⑨ EngineCoreProc.process_output_sockets() (core.py:1149)
  output thread: output_queue.get() → msgpack encode → ZMQ PUSH
  │
  ▼  [ZMQ: EngineCoreOutputs via output_socket]
  │
⑩ AsyncMPClient.process_outputs_socket()
  ZMQ recv → msgpack decode → outputs_queue.put_nowait()
  │
  ▼
⑪ AsyncLLM output_handler()
  outputs_queue.get() → OutputProcessor.process_outputs()
    → IncrementalDetokenizer：增量反分词
    → LogprobsProcessor：logprobs 计算
    → 构造 RequestOutput → queue.put()（RequestOutputCollector）
  │
  ▼
⑫ AsyncLLM.generate() yield
    → OpenAIServingChat.chat_completion_stream_generator()
        → 转换为 ChatCompletionStreamResponse
        → SSE format: "data: {...}\n\n"
    → StreamingResponse → Client
- https://zhixuan-zxli.github.io/llm/vllm_frontend_backend/ -

item.title: 2026年5月
item.description:
Zhixuan's Blog https://zhixuan-zxli.github.io/life/2605/ -

ZX上一次回广州的家是在春节。5月份他想回家，因为他累了，他想试试开一下许久没有开过的车。他和Jennie & David去扫墓。一个山青水秀的地方，白鹭成群。它们大部分时间栖息在树上，有时候会从一个山头迁徙到另一个山头，起飞、掠过，降落。灵魂安息在这片净土上，而它们是这里的守护神。

每次回家总是有吃不完的鲜美的水果。后来他想知道那时候吃的番石榴在哪里买的，印象中又软又香。

“你是指上次在家里吃的那个吗？那是广东本地的品种，才又香又滑溜。明年夏天回来吃吧。”

“淘宝上有这个品种吗？”

“不会有，这个品种很难存放和运输。所以出了广东就没有了。”

J & D告诉ZX，他们打算重新装修一下已经住了20多年的家。

“你妈考虑这件事情很久了”，D说。

“重新装修以后，我们想把这面墙打掉，原来的书房就和客厅连通了。这样会有更多空间。房间的门我们也想换一个朝向。你觉得怎么样呢？” J问。

这自然没有什么不好的，ZX想着。他觉得一次翻修可以把时间带来的小瑕疵修补掉，但又不至于磨灭20多年来的生活气息。他有点憧憬，想象他在新家中以一种什么样的姿态生活，或许会很惬意。D一如既往地热衷于设计、画图，他给我们展示他用软件画的翻新后的平面图，细致、严谨。

他们又聊了聊J & D年轻时候求学的经历，后来是如何工作、转行。ZX想知道J & D是如何走到一起的，但J似乎一直难以启齿。

ZX把《正常人》的小说读完了，心满意足。

黄永玉画展。一个活了99岁的艺术家，是怎么在他接近生命最后时刻创造出这么轻盈的作品的呢。

ZX的生日通常是二十四节气的“芒种”。一大早他就收到了来自Jennie的祝福，有种有收，似乎每年不外如此。

晚上，Sydney、DJ和CD在ZX的房间。他们吹气球、布置房间、吃喝东西、外放音乐。ZX觉得仿佛他们在举办一个生日派对，这是一个为他举办的生日派对，因为他想不起来一个以他为中心的派对是什么样子的，他在想他人生中是否经历过这样的时刻。他们在他许愿的时候唱起了生日歌。

“这么快就许完了吗？”

“那我再认真许一下。”

他在心中再次默念了他的生日愿望。其实ZX在那天一早就在想怎么安排三个生日愿望，他觉得他已经考虑清楚了。要是有任何人问起，他可以坚定又毫无保留地分享给他人。

S似乎是一个天生的艺术家。她像一位导演一样安排好了现场布置的每一个细节。她有一种天赋，她在脑海中有一种影像，她在等待他人最好看的一面，她为每一个人拍了拍立得。ZX很喜欢她为他拍的一幅单人生日照：他坐在沙发上，戴着生日帽，双手捧着小蛋糕，他浅蓝色的睡衣和旁边粉色的气球营造出一种梦幻温柔的日常感，背景是HAPPY BIRTHDAY的字母气球。

来日再聚。

- https://zhixuan-zxli.github.io/life/2605/ -

item.title: Scheduler, and KV transfer in disaggregated prefill
item.description:
Zhixuan's Blog https://zhixuan-zxli.github.io/llm/scheduler/ -

1. Scheduler

Scheduler (vllm/v1/core/sched/scheduler.py) is the central resource allocator for vLLM’s v1 engine. Each iteration it decides which requests run, how many tokens each gets, and which KV cache blocks to (re-)use. It owns two queues — self.waiting and self.running — plus a KVCacheManager for block allocation and an optional KVConnectorBase_V1 for cross-node KV transfer. The scheduler has no notion of a distinct “prefill phase” or “decode phase”; every request is simply tracked by num_computed_tokens and num_tokens_with_spec, and the scheduler’s job is to close the gap between them.

1.1. Terminology — token counts on a Request

The scheduling algorithm is intentionally uniform across prefill, chunked prefill, decode, and speculative decoding. That uniformity depends on a handful of per-request counters. All of them live on Request (vllm/v1/request.py):

Field Meaning
num_prompt_tokens Length of the initial prompt. Immutable after admission.
num_tokens len(prompt) + len(output_token_ids) — everything already “committed” to the request. Property, not a stored field.
num_tokens_with_spec num_tokens + len(spec_token_ids) — the target the scheduler tries to catch up to this step.
num_computed_tokens Tokens whose KV has been (or is being) produced. Advanced eagerly by _update_after_schedule using the scheduled count; corrected downward by update_from_output when spec-decode draft tokens are rejected or a KV load fails.
num_new_tokens Per-step delta the scheduler assigns to this request. Starts as num_tokens_with_spec + num_output_placeholders - num_computed_tokens, then is clipped by token_budget, long_prefill_token_threshold, and max_model_len - 1 - num_computed_tokens.
num_output_placeholders Async-scheduling reservation: tokens that have been scheduled but whose sample has not yet come back. Included optimistically in num_computed_tokens; corrected on rejection.
num_external_computed_tokens Tokens claimed from a remote KV cache via connector (P/D disaggregation). Recorded when get_num_new_matched_tokens returns a non-zero count.
num_cached_tokens Tokens with prefix-cache hits (local + external), stamped once when the request first runs.

Loop invariant: each step tries to shrink num_tokens_with_spec - num_computed_tokens. Ordinary decode has gap = 1 (+ any spec drafts); prompt prefill has gap = many, and chunked prefill slices it across steps.

1.2. Call stack per EngineCore step

The whole per-iteration flow, with the scheduler methods that matter ([§n.n] cross-references the sections below; KV-connector hooks are highlighted with ▶):

EngineCore.step()
│
├── Scheduler.schedule()                                                          [§1.4]
│   │
│   ├── Pass 1 — RUNNING queue
│   │   └── kv_cache_manager.allocate_slots(...)                                  (may preempt)
│   │
│   ├── Pass 2 — WAITING queue                                                    (skipped if Pass 1 preempted)
│   │   ├── if status == WAITING_FOR_REMOTE_KVS:
│   │   │       _update_waiting_for_remote_kv(request)                            [§1.6]
│   │   │       └── (re-enters as WAITING or PREEMPTED once transfer done)
│   │   ├── if request.num_computed_tokens == 0:                                   (first-touch path)
│   │   │   ├── new_computed_blocks, num_local_hit
│   │   │   │       = kv_cache_manager.get_computed_blocks(request)
│   │   │   └── ▶ connector.get_num_new_matched_tokens(request, num_local_hit)    [§1.6]
│   │   │           → (ext_tokens, load_kv_async)
│   │   ├── else: (resumed after async KV recv — num_computed_tokens already set)
│   │   ├── num_new_tokens = (0 if load_kv_async else num_tokens - num_computed)
│   │   ├── kv_cache_manager.allocate_slots(...)
│   │   ├── ▶ connector.update_state_after_alloc(request, blocks, ext_tokens)     [§1.6]
│   │   └── if load_kv_async: status = WAITING_FOR_REMOTE_KVS; skip
│   │
│   ├── Build SchedulerOutput
│   │
│   ├── ▶ connector.build_connector_meta(scheduler_output)                        [§1.6]
│   │       → scheduler_output.kv_connector_metadata
│   │
│   └── _update_after_schedule(scheduler_output) (eager advance)                  [§1.5]
│
├── model_executor.execute_model(scheduler_output)
│   ├── worker binds kv_connector_metadata, kicks off start_load_kv (if any)
│   ├── forward + sample
│   └── returns ModelRunnerOutput
│         { sampled_token_ids, logprobs, pooler_output,
│           kv_connector_output: { finished_sending, finished_recving,
│                                  invalid_block_ids, kv_connector_stats } }
│
└── Scheduler.update_from_output(scheduler_output, model_runner_output)           [§1.7]
    │
    ├── Phase A — KV-load failures
    │
    ├── Phase B — per-request reconciliation (loop over num_scheduled_tokens)
    │   ├── Correct num_accepted, num_rejected,                                   (spec-decode correction)
    │   │           num_computed_tokens, num_output_placeholders
    │   ├── _update_request_with_output(req, generated_ids)
    │   ├── if stopped: _free_request(req)
    │   │       └── ▶ connector.request_finished(...)                             [§1.6]
    │   └── build EngineCoreOutput per client
    │
    ├── Phase C — post-loop
    │   └── _update_from_kv_xfer_finished(kv_connector_output)                    [§1.6]
    │       └── ▶ connector.update_connector_output(...)
    │
    └── return dict[client_index → EngineCoreOutputs] to frontend

The split _update_after_schedule ⇄ update_from_output is deliberate: the former eagerly advances counters so the next step can plan against the current forward pass (chunked prefill, async scheduling); the latter corrects any over-estimates — spec-decode rejections and failed KV loads — once the model result is known.

1.3. add_request — request enters the system

A Request is constructed from an EngineCoreRequest, pushed onto self.waiting, and registered in self.requests. Status: WAITING. num_computed_tokens = 0; num_cached_tokens = -1 (sentinel — filled in on first scheduling).

1.4. schedule() — the two-pass loop

The main loop runs in two sequential passes, sharing a single token_budget = max_num_scheduled_tokens:

Pass 1 — running requests
Pass 2 — waiting requests   (skipped entirely if any preemption occurred in Pass 1)

Pass 1: running requests

Iterates self.running in queue order. For each request, the number of new tokens to schedule is:

num_new_tokens = request.num_tokens_with_spec \
               + request.num_output_placeholders \
               - request.num_computed_tokens
num_new_tokens = min(num_new_tokens,
                     long_prefill_token_threshold,
                     token_budget,
                     max_model_len - 1 - request.num_computed_tokens)

num_tokens_with_spec includes speculative draft tokens, so this same formula covers ordinary decoding (gap = 1), chunked-prefill continuation (gap = many), and spec decoding (gap = 1 + drafts).

KV block allocation and preemption. Omitted here — see the posts on KV cache / model runner. If allocate_slots cannot find room, the scheduler preempts the lowest-priority running request and retries.

Pass 2: waiting requests

Skipped entirely if any preemption happened in Pass 1 (to avoid starving running requests further). Otherwise, peeks from self.waiting in order. Several checks can defer a request (re-inserted at the head of the queue via skipped_waiting_requests) rather than schedule it:

  • WAITING_FOR_REMOTE_KVS: KV transfer from a remote prefill node is still in flight. _update_waiting_for_remote_kv is called; the request is either woken (status flipped back to WAITING/PREEMPTED) or re-parked.

For requests that survive the checks, the scheduler resolves prefix-cache hits (only for first-touch requests — resumed async-load ones already have num_computed_tokens > 0):

# Local prefix cache hit
new_computed_blocks, num_local_hit = kv_cache_manager.get_computed_blocks(request)

# Remote prefix cache hit (KV connector, e.g. P/D disaggregation)
ext_tokens, load_kv_async = connector.get_num_new_matched_tokens(request, num_local_hit)

num_computed_tokens = num_local_hit + ext_tokens
num_new_tokens = 0 if load_kv_async else request.num_tokens - num_computed_tokens

If load_kv_async is True (the remote KV isn’t here yet), the scheduler still calls allocate_slots — reserving destination blocks — then registers them with the connector via update_state_after_alloc and parks the request as WAITING_FOR_REMOTE_KVS. No forward-pass work is scheduled for the request this step.

Otherwise, after a successful allocate_slots, the request transitions WAITING → RUNNING (or PREEMPTED → RUNNING for a resumption), and the sync-load path lets update_state_after_alloc note the reserved blocks.

1.5. _update_after_schedule

def _update_after_schedule(self, scheduler_output):
    num_scheduled_tokens = scheduler_output.num_scheduled_tokens
    for req_id, n in num_scheduled_tokens.items():
        request = self.requests[req_id]
        request.num_computed_tokens += n         # eager advance
    self.finished_req_ids = set()                # wiped so it doesn't leak into the next output

Things to notice:

  1. Eager, not correct. The advance uses the scheduled count, not what the model actually accepts. Spec-decode rejection unwinds it in update_from_output. Doing the advance here lets the next schedule() see a chunked-prefill request as “already partially computed” without waiting for the model — this is what enables both chunked prefill and async scheduling to keep the GPU busy.
  2. finished_req_ids reset. The set is populated by _free_request during Phase B of the previous update_from_output, read once by this step’s SchedulerOutput, and then cleared here in preparation for the next step.

1.6. KV connector — scheduler-side hooks

At the five hook points marked ▶ in the call stack, the scheduler talks to KVConnectorBase_V1 (role = SCHEDULER). All are pure planning — no tensors, no GPU touching.

get_num_new_matched_tokens(request, num_local_hit) → (ext_tokens, load_kv_async)

update_state_after_alloc(request, blocks, num_external_tokens)

build_connector_meta(scheduler_output) → KVConnectorMetadata

_update_waiting_for_remote_kv(request) → bool (scheduler-internal, connector-driven)

Runs at the top of the Pass-2 body when a request is WAITING_FOR_REMOTE_KVS. Returns True iff the transfer completed since the last step — the check reads self.finished_recving_kv_req_ids, which was populated by the previous update_from_output. On success:

(block_ids,) = self.kv_cache_manager.get_block_ids(request.request_id)
num_computed = min(len(block_ids) * self.block_size, request.num_tokens)
if num_computed == request.num_tokens:
    num_computed -= 1                                # leave at least one token to sample
self.kv_cache_manager.cache_blocks(request, num_computed)
request.num_computed_tokens = num_computed

The request is then flipped back to WAITING (or PREEMPTED for a resumption) and re-enters normal Pass-2 scheduling in the same step, taking the else branch that skips get_computed_blocks — the blocks are already there.

_update_from_kv_xfer_finished(kv_connector_output) (Phase C of update_from_output)

if self.connector is not None:
    self.connector.update_connector_output(kv_connector_output)
for req_id in kv_connector_output.finished_recving or ():
    self.finished_recving_kv_req_ids.add(req_id)     # picked up next schedule()
for req_id in kv_connector_output.finished_sending or ():
    self._free_blocks(self.requests[req_id])         # producer side: release deferred blocks

Two directions:

  • finished_recving on the consumer (decode) node: unblocks _update_waiting_for_remote_kv next step.
  • finished_sending on the producer (prefill) node: releases blocks that request_finished(...) had deferred (i.e. blocks that were held past request completion until the peer confirmed receipt).

request_finished(request, block_ids) → (delay_free_blocks, kv_transfer_params) (called from _free_request)

The connector’s chance to hold on to KV blocks past request finish. Returning delay_free_blocks=True skips the immediate _free_blocks; the blocks are freed later when finished_sending reports the peer has consumed them. kv_transfer_params (block ids, cluster id, host:port, DP rank, …) is shipped back with the EngineCoreOutput so the decode side can locate the source.

1.7. update_from_output(scheduler_output, model_runner_output)

Three phases: fault handling, per-request reconciliation, post-loop bookkeeping.

Phase B — Per-request reconciliation. For each (req_id, n_sched) in scheduler_output.num_scheduled_tokens:

  1. Spec-decode correction. If draft tokens were scheduled for this request:

    num_draft    = len(scheduled_spec_token_ids)
num_accepted = len(generated_token_ids) - 1        # sampler emits accepted + 1 bonus
num_rejected = num_draft - num_accepted
if request.num_computed_tokens > 0:
    request.num_computed_tokens     -= num_rejected
if request.num_output_placeholders > 0:
    request.num_output_placeholders -= num_rejected

    This undoes the over-advancement that _update_after_schedule did with the (optimistic) scheduled count.

  2. Append & stop-check via _update_request_with_output:

    for tok in new_token_ids:
    request.append_output_token_ids(tok)
    if check_stop(request, self.max_model_len):
        stopped = True
        del new_token_ids[num_new:]                # trim tokens after the stop
        break

    check_stop inspects EOS, max_tokens, stop_token_ids, stop_str, and max_model_len.

  3. On stop, _free_request:

    delay_free_blocks, kv_xfer_params = self._connector_finished(request)
self.encoder_cache_manager.free(request)
self.finished_req_ids.add(request.request_id)     # → next SchedulerOutput.finished_req_ids
if not delay_free_blocks:
    self._free_blocks(request)                    # kv_cache_manager.free + del self.requests[id]

    kv_xfer_params is threaded back into EngineCoreOutput for this request so the frontend can pass it to the decode side.

  4. Emit EngineCoreOutput for the client: new tokens, logprobs, pooler output, kv_transfer_params, finish reason, num_cached_tokens, structured-output events.

Phase C — Post-loop.

  • Remove stopped requests from self.running / self.waiting.
  • _update_from_kv_xfer_finished(kv_connector_output) — see §1.6.
  • Drain KV cache events from both the KV cache manager and the connector; publish a KVEventBatch on self.kv_event_publisher.
  • Aggregate finished-request sets per client, attach SchedulerStats + SpecDecodingStats + KVConnectorStats, and return dict[client_index → EngineCoreOutputs].

1.8. Disaggregation lifecycle (scheduler view)

Prefill node. A waiting request is scheduled with load_kv_async=False and its connector metadata built. When the prefill finishes, request_finished returns delay_free_blocks=True; blocks are kept alive until finished_sending arrives from the peer via _update_from_kv_xfer_finished.

Decode node (three rounds):

  • Round 1 — schedule(): waiting request gets ext_tokens > 0 and load_kv_async=True from get_num_new_matched_tokens. allocate_slots reserves destination blocks; update_state_after_alloc registers them with the connector; status flips to WAITING_FOR_REMOTE_KVS. build_connector_meta packages the pending pull; execute_model kicks off start_load_kv on the worker.
  • Round 2 — update_from_output: _update_from_kv_xfer_finished sees the request id in kv_connector_output.finished_recving and puts it in self.finished_recving_kv_req_ids.
  • Round 3 — schedule(): Pass 2’s _update_waiting_for_remote_kv finds the request in finished_recving_kv_req_ids, calls cache_blocks, sets num_computed_tokens = min(len(blocks) * block_size, num_tokens) - (0 or 1), and flips status back to WAITING. Same step, the else-branch schedules only the residual tokens beyond the received KV prefix.

2. Connector

In standard (aggregated) inference, every GPU does both prefill (processing the full prompt) and decode (generating one token at a time). The problem is that these two phases have very different compute profiles: prefill is compute-bound (long sequences), decode is memory-bandwidth-bound (single tokens). Running them together causes head-of-line blocking and GPU underutilization.

Disaggregated prefill splits these into separate nodes. A prefill node runs the full forward pass over the prompt, then ships its KV cache to a decode node, which starts autoregressive generation from that already-computed state.

2.1. Connector Interface: KVConnectorBase_V1

vllm/distributed/kv_transfer/kv_connector/v1/base.py

The abstract base class. Every connector implements two distinct sides:

Scheduler side (runs in the scheduler process, no tensors, pure planning):

Method Purpose
get_num_new_matched_tokens(request, computed) Tell the scheduler how many tokens can be claimed from a remote prefill
update_state_after_alloc(request, blocks, n) Record which blocks were allocated for incoming KV
build_connector_meta(scheduler_output) Package per-step metadata to ship to workers
request_finished(request, block_ids) Optionally defer block freeing until async send completes

Worker side (runs in the GPU worker process, operates on tensors):

Method Purpose
start_load_kv(forward_context) Begin async KV receives (consumer)
wait_for_layer_load(layer_name) Sync point before using a received layer’s KV
save_kv_layer(layer_name, kv_cache, attn_metadata) Async-send a layer’s KV (producer)
wait_for_save() Sync point after all layers are forwarded
get_finished(...) Report which requests finished sending/receiving

The scheduler-side / worker-side split mirrors vLLM v1’s process boundary: the scheduler manipulates block tables and request queues, while workers touch GPU memory.

2.2. Scheduler Integration

vllm/v1/core/sched/scheduler.py

The scheduler instantiates the connector with KVConnectorRole.SCHEDULER and calls it at three points per scheduling step:

  1. Token counting — get_num_new_matched_tokens() lets a consumer claim up to len(prompt) - 1 tokens as “already computed” (coming from the prefill node), avoiding redundant recomputation.
  2. Metadata building — after scheduling decisions, build_connector_meta() packages which requests need sends/receives this step.
  3. Completion — request_finished() lets the connector optionally defer freeing KV blocks until async sends complete.

The scheduler also processes worker feedback: when finished_recving reports a request is fully loaded, it transitions that request from WAITING_FOR_REMOTE_KVS → ready to schedule for decode.

2.3. Worker Integration

vllm/v1/worker/kv_connector_model_runner_mixin.py vllm/attention/utils/kv_transfer_utils.py

KVConnectorModelRunnerMixin wraps each forward pass:

connector.bind_connector_metadata(metadata)
connector.start_load_kv(forward_context)   # kick off async recvs
try:
    # ... model forward pass ...
finally:
    connector.wait_for_save()              # drain async sends
    output.finished_sending, output.finished_recving = connector.get_finished(...)
    connector.clear_connector_metadata()

Each attention layer is wrapped by maybe_transfer_kv_layer (a decorator in kv_transfer_utils.py):

connector.wait_for_layer_load(layer_name)  # wait for this layer's KV
result = attention_forward(...)            # use received KV or compute fresh
connector.save_kv_layer(layer_name, ...)   # send this layer's KV

This per-layer interleaving is the intended design: KV sending and the model forward pass can overlap in time, hiding transfer latency.

2.4. Async KV Transfer Lifecycle (Decode Node)

The actual transfer does not start when request.status = WAITING_FOR_REMOTE_KVS is set. That only parks the request. The transfer is kicked off on the next execute_model call.

Scheduler step N:
  get_num_new_matched_tokens()        -> (N tokens, async=True)
  kv_cache_manager.allocate_blocks()  # reserve destination blocks
  connector.update_state_after_alloc()# register blocks with connector
  request.status = WAITING_FOR_REMOTE_KVS  # park the request
  build_connector_meta()              # serialize pending ops into metadata

execute_model (step N):
  connector.bind_connector_metadata() # load the metadata
  connector.start_load_kv()           # << transfer actually starts here
  [GPU forward pass for other requests] # overlaps with the transfer
  connector.get_finished()            # poll: which transfers completed?

Scheduler step N+1 (or later):
  _update_waiting_for_remote_kv()     # sees request in finished_recving_kv_req_ids
  kv_cache_manager.cache_blocks()
  request.num_computed_tokens = N     # now > 0
  request.status = WAITING            # re-enters scheduling via the else-branch

The else branch in scheduler.py:548 is only reached on the second scheduling attempt after num_computed_tokens has been written by _update_waiting_for_remote_kv. It skips get_computed_blocks entirely — the blocks are already allocated and cached — and schedules only the residual tokens beyond the received KV prefix.

2.5. LLMDataDist

Class Role
PrefillConnectorScheduler Scheduler side on prefill node
PrefillConnectorWorker Worker side on prefill node
DecodeConnectorScheduler Scheduler side on decode node
DecodeConnectorWorker Worker side on decode node

Bulk transfer, not per-layer. The per-layer interleaving methods — wait_for_layer_load, save_kv_layer, and wait_for_save — are all no-ops in LLMDataDistConnector. Instead, the entire KV cache is transferred as a single bulk operation inside start_load_kv. On the decode side, DecodeConnectorWorker.start_load_kv() submits one ThreadPoolExecutor job per request; each job calls datadist_manager.pull_kv(), which issues an RDMA pull over RoCE (via the llm_datadist C++ library). Because the transfer is not interleaved with the forward pass, the decode GPU idles during the transfer step rather than overlapping work.

Scheduler-side flow (decode node). DecodeConnectorScheduler.get_num_new_matched_tokens() returns (len(prompt) - 1, True) for any new decode request, telling the scheduler to treat the entire prompt as externally computed and request an async load. After kv_cache_manager.allocate_slots(), update_state_after_alloc() records the request in _reqs_need_recv. build_connector_meta() then converts that list into a DatadistConnectorMetadata containing, per request:

  • local_block_ids — where to write the pulled KV on the decode node
  • remote_block_ids / remote_host / remote_cluster_id — where to read from on the prefill node
  • kv_transfer_params — additional routing info (DP rank, PP partition)

Block lifetime on the prefill node. PrefillConnectorScheduler.request_finished() returns delay_free_blocks=True, so the scheduler does not immediately release the prefill’s KV blocks. Instead, PrefillConnectorWorker keeps them alive until the decode node confirms receipt via a ZMQ message. The maximum hold time is BLOCK_RELEASE_DELAY = 600 s.

End-to-end sequence of LLMDataDist

  1. Prefill worker register_kv_caches → native runtime pins memory + advertises BlocksCacheKey(cluster_id, model_id); listener already up from init.
  2. Request finishes prefill → scheduler returns kv_transfer_params (block ids + cluster id + host:port) to decode via the vLLM control plane.
  3. Decode update_state_after_alloc stores it; build_connector_metadata hands it to decode worker.
  4. Decode worker _read_blocks → datadist_manager.pull_kv → (link on demand via register_link if needed) → cache_manager.pull_blocks(...) — RDMA READ happens here, entirely native.
  5. Decode ZMQ-pushes the remote_request_id back to prefill’s get_pulled_kv_req_list (line 495-511).
  6. Prefill’s get_finished matches it against requests_finish_time and reports the send as done, freeing blocks.
